set-variable.name: customerAccount
set-variable.value: @{ var b = context.Request.Body.As<JObject>(true); return b["customerAccount"] != null ? (string)b["customerAccount"] : ""; }

return-response.set-body: {"error":"customerAccount is required in the request body"}

rewrite-uri.template: @{ var acc = (string)context.Variables["customerAccount"]; var filter = System.Uri.EscapeDataString("CustomerAccount eq '" + acc + "'"); return "/CustomersV3?cross-company=true&$top=1&$filter=" + filter; }
